name: Illusion of Chaos
name_jp: イリュージョン・オブ・カオス
desc: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Chaos Form". You can reveal this card in your hand; add 1 "Dark Magician", or 1 non-Ritual Monster that mentions it, from your Deck to your hand, then place 1 card from your hand on top of the Deck. When your opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can return this card to the hand, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Dark Magician" from your GY, and if you do that, negate that activated effect. You can only use each effect of "Illusion of Chaos" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Chaos Form". You can reveal this card in your hand; add 1 "Dark Magician", or 1 non-Ritual Monster that mentions it, from your Deck to your hand, then place 1 card from your hand on top of the Deck. When your opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can return this card to the hand, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Dark Magician" from your GY, and if you do that, negate that activated effect. You can only use each effect of "Illusion of Chaos" once per turn.
eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Chaos Form". You can only use each effect of "Illusion of Chaos" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

jp_sets.set: Tactical-Try Pack: Dark Magic / HERO / Mikanko

action: Reveals itself in the hand for cost
Places cards from the player's hand on the top of the Deck
Returns itself from field to hand
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
